'''ây-y-t-k''' ('''kayaytekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:axiomize|axiomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-y-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:axiomize|axiomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-y-t-k
|-
! Lemma
| kayaytekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyaytekoko|thiyaytekoko]] || [[word:jiyaytekoko|jiyaytekoko]] || [[word:shiyaytekoko|shiyaytekoko]] || [[word:kiyaytekoko|kiyaytekoko]]
|-

|-
